positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for pos_problem
% SZS output start Proof for pos_problem
1. ! [X0] : (hydrocarbon(X0) => organic_compound(X0)) [input(axiom)]
2. ! [X0] : (alkane(X0) => hydrocarbon(X0)) [input(axiom)]
3. ! [X0] : (organic_compound(X0) => chemical_compound(X0)) [input(axiom)]
5. ! [X0] : (chemical_compound(X0) => ~contains_only_one_element(X0)) [input(axiom)]
6. ! [X0] : ((chemical_compound(X0) & contains_only_one_element(X0)) | (~chemical_compound(X0) & ~contains_only_one_element(X0))) [input(axiom)]
7. ! [X0] : ((contains_only_one_element(X0) | contains_carbon(X0)) => (~chemical_compound(X0) & ~alkane(X0))) [input(conjecture)]
8. ~! [X0] : ((contains_only_one_element(X0) | contains_carbon(X0)) => (~chemical_compound(X0) & ~alkane(X0))) [negated conjecture 7]
9. ~! [X0] : (~chemical_compound(X0) & ~alkane(X0)) [pure predicate removal 8]
11. ! [X0] : (organic_compound(X0) | ~hydrocarbon(X0)) [ennf transformation 1]
12. ! [X0] : (hydrocarbon(X0) | ~alkane(X0)) [ennf transformation 2]
13. ! [X0] : (chemical_compound(X0) | ~organic_compound(X0)) [ennf transformation 3]
14. ! [X0] : (~contains_only_one_element(X0) | ~chemical_compound(X0)) [ennf transformation 5]
15. ? [X0] : (chemical_compound(X0) | alkane(X0)) [ennf transformation 9]
16. ? [X0] : (chemical_compound(X0) | alkane(X0)) => (chemical_compound(sK0) | alkane(sK0)) [skolem symbol introduction]
17. chemical_compound(sK0) | alkane(sK0) [skolemisation 15,16]
18. ~hydrocarbon(X0) | organic_compound(X0) [cnf transformation 11]
19. ~alkane(X0) | hydrocarbon(X0) [cnf transformation 12]
20. ~organic_compound(X0) | chemical_compound(X0) [cnf transformation 13]
21. ~contains_only_one_element(X0) | ~chemical_compound(X0) [cnf transformation 14]
23. contains_only_one_element(X0) | ~chemical_compound(X0) [cnf transformation 6]
26. chemical_compound(sK0) | alkane(sK0) [cnf transformation 17]
28. 1 <=> alkane(sK0) [avatar definition]
30. alkane(sK0) <- (1) [avatar component clause 28]
32. 2 <=> chemical_compound(sK0) [avatar definition]
34. chemical_compound(sK0) <- (2) [avatar component clause 32]
35. 1 | 2 [avatar split clause 26,32,28]
36. ~chemical_compound(X0) [forward subsumption resolution 21,23]
37. $false <- (2) [forward subsumption resolution 34,36]
38. ~2 [avatar contradiction clause 37]
39. hydrocarbon(sK0) <- (1) [resolution 19,30]
40. organic_compound(sK0) <- (1) [resolution 39,18]
41. chemical_compound(sK0) <- (1) [resolution 40,20]
42. $false <- (1) [forward subsumption resolution 41,36]
43. ~1 [avatar contradiction clause 42]
s1. 1 | 2 [sat_conversion 35]
s2. ~2 [sat_conversion 38]
s3. ~1 [sat_conversion 43]
s4. # [rat s1,s2,s3]
44. $false [avatar sat refutation s4]
% SZS output end Proof for pos_problem
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg_problem
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u23,negated_conjecture,
    ~contains_only_one_element(X0) | ~chemical_compound(X0)).

cnf(u25,negated_conjecture,
    ~contains_only_one_element(X0)).

cnf(u24,negated_conjecture,
    ~chemical_compound(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define contains_carbon(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define organic_compound(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define hydrocarbon(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define alkane(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
